test_cases.original_prompt: Generate a brand logo for Cymbal

guidelines.text: Logo must be clean, modern, and professional. Should use brand colors. Must be easily recognizable and suitable for digital use.

test_cases.original_prompt: Create a product photography shot of a vacuum cleaner

guidelines.text: Product images must show the product clearly. Good lighting required. Product should be the main focus.

test_cases.original_prompt: Create a chocolate product image for gourmet brand

guidelines.text: Food imagery should be appetizing and high quality. Warm tones preferred for chocolate products.
guidelines.visual_style: Premium food photography, rich and inviting
